
name: 🧾 Monthly Review
description: Reflect on the month and close the loop
title: "🧾 Monthly Review: "
labels: ["review"]
body:
  - type: textarea
    id: wins
    attributes:
      label: Wins
      placeholder: What went well?

  - type: textarea
    id: losses
    attributes:
      label: Friction / Misses
      placeholder: What didn’t work?

  - type: textarea
    id: patterns
    attributes:
      label: Patterns Noticed
      placeholder: Energy, habits, behavior trends

  - type: textarea
    id: next
    attributes:
      label: Adjustments
      placeholder: What will you change next month?

  - type: textarea
    id: reflection
    attributes:
      label: Final Reflection
      placeholder: Anything else?

#yml #issue #template
